(Apply only if the task could be assigned to parallel users)"},{"value":"DASHBOARD_TASK_INSIDE_LOOP","content":"Is this task in a loop?"},{"value":"DASHBOARD_TASK_BEFORE_LOOP_TASK_NODE","content":"Node ID of Loop Initiator Task"},{"value":"DASHBOARD_TASK_CLONED_NODE","content":"Does this task has a cloned node?"},{"value":"DASHBOARD_TASK_CLONED_NODE_ID","content":"Cloned Node ID"},{"value":"DASHBOARD_TASK_CONDITIONS_REQUIRED","content":"Does this task has conditions to occurs?"}]

script.title: Get List of Groups
script.code:
<?php
/**********************************
 * Get List of Groups
 *
 * by Telmo Chiri
 *********************************/
require_once("/Northleaf_PHP_Library.php");
$apiHost = getenv('API_HOST');

$urlGetGroups = $apiHost."/groups?status=ACTIVE&order_direction=asc&per_page=1000";
$responseGetGroups = callApiUrlGuzzle($urlGetGroups, "GET", []);

return $responseGetGroups['data'];
